commit.subject: LU-4009 osd: be able to remount objset w/o osd restart
commit.message:
LU-4009 osd: be able to remount objset w/o osd restart

this is needed to support ZIL: to be able to rollback
we have to close the objset and then re-open it. this
patch changes internal structuring to allow this.
